clues: WSL2 (Windows Subsystem for Linux) cannot access the internet from the Linux environment.
Pinging 8.8.8.8 from WSL returns 'Network is unreachable'.
Windows host networking works perfectly with full internet access.
The WSL instance was working fine until the computer was restarted.
The WSL network adapter in Windows shows an APIPA address (169.254.x.x).
